_note: the era change to Inauguration of Tranquillity 'the first year (AD 190)' is narrated on-page after the deposition; Cao Cao's flight and call-to-arms run into 190, feeding directly into ch5 (190)
the Yuan Shu campaign is 197, but the closing expedition against Zhang Xiu is explicitly 'the summer, the fourth month of the third year of Rebuilt Tranquillity (AD 198)'

the Wu half is narrated in-chapter across years: the hostage demand 'in the seventh year (AD 202)', the Huang Zu river battle 'late in the eighth year (AD 203)', Sun Yi's murder, and Lady Wu's deathbed 'in the twelfth year (AD 207)', before the 208 Xiakou campaign; same multi-year convention as ch33 (204-207). Conservative alternative: 207-208 if only the Liu Bei main plot should count
